chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1723 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.6794/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 17-10-2025 Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with SIP Gulzar Ahmed Abro on behalf of SSP, Khairpur and SIP Ghulam Mustafa on behalf of SHO PS Kumb >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Additional AG files statements on behalf of Respondents 1 and 3, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the Petitioners. Learned Additional AG submits that the case bearing Crime No.169 of 2025 under Sections 489-F, 506/2 and 34 PPC registered with Police Station, Kumb, District Khairpur, the quashment thereof has been sought through this Petition, has now been challaned before the Court of law, having jurisdiction. After such statement, Counsel for the Petitioners, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition and submits that the Petitioners will approach the concerned trial Court by filing application u/s 249-A or 265-K Cr.PC, as the case may be, for appropriate relief. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
